creator: lloyd@dilley.me
text:
(In reply to Victor from comment #1)
Thank you for catching the QML pathing issue, Victor. I've corrected that along with removing the extraneous tabs and adjusting the Makefile parameter order. As far as PREFIX is concerned, I've done something similar to security/rkhunter in regards to specifying the portname statically in pkg-plist. I've validated successful default installation to /usr/local/segs. An updated shar has been attached for your viewing pleasure. Thanks again for the feedback, sir.
